case_title: STEVE IKE VS. WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IKE, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IKE, STEVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR PROCESS OF SERVICE: CT CORP SERVED MAY-16-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA M. RODRIGUEZ--ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $310.50 FILED BY IKE, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
